tiers.label: Glass
tiers.note: Against the boards. You will hear the hits land.

tiers.label: Lower bowl
tiers.note: Full sightline of both blue lines. The best value in the building.

tiers.label: Club
tiers.note: Wider seats, private concourse, in-seat service.

tiers.label: Upper bowl
tiers.note: Loudest seats in Raleigh. Bring your voice, you will need it in April.
